name: wormhole
description: Evidence-gated planning and orchestration state for AI coding agents.
long_description: Wormhole exposes a local MCP server for evidence records, open-question gates, native context packs, context-pack budget review, reversible optimization, optimized command execution, local orchestration runs, orchestration task state, graph-first repo indexing and graph artifacts, repo watch sessions, git diff detection, repo activity recording, project contract detection, structured diagnostics, impact-aware verification planning, safety scanning, deterministic semantic fallback search, safe LSP probes, LSP feedback replanning, one-shot project onboarding, native architecture maps, entrypoint flow discovery, blast-radius analysis, task-scoped project context packs, agent-facing routing, layered tool maps, structured tool catalog queries, next-tool recommendations, mission routes, prepared agent context, durable repo/semantic indexes, process-local LSP sessions, dependency security reports, action admission policy, optimization adapters, required Python runtime, native media ingestion, shell hook management, discovery-driven tool generation, learned orchestration policy gates, safe live policy feedback, policy baseline comparison, reasoning strategy research, printed-tool execution, native tool generation, deterministic conductor scaffolds, durable behavior policy, external agent dispatch, shared agent workspace memory, model-profile traces, typed artifacts, and workbench rendering.

tools.name: mission_start
tools.description: Start an evidence-gated planning mission.

tools.name: round_start
tools.description: Start a gather and reason round.

tools.name: record_evidence
tools.description: Record sourced mission evidence.

tools.name: record_question
tools.description: Record an open question or assumption gap.

tools.name: gate_request

tools.name: emit_plan
tools.description: Emit the evidence-cited Markdown plan.

tools.name: ctx_pack_budget_review

tools.name: agent_complete

prompts.name: wormhole_orchestrate
prompts.description: Run a structured Wormhole planning or orchestration mission.
prompts.text:
Use Wormhole for this mission: ${arguments.objective}

Follow the Wormhole loop strictly: mission_start, round_start, gather evidence, record_evidence, record_question for gaps, register tasks when parallel work is useful, use ctx_record and ctx_pack_create for native context packs, use ctx_pack_budget_review and ctx_pack_refresh when context packs overflow or stale records need eviction, use optimization_apply or optimized_command_run when large outputs need reversible compaction, use orchestration_plan_local for local task waves and orchestration_run_local for deterministic local outcomes, gate_request, then emit_plan only after the gate opens. Use project_intelligence_snapshot, tool_layer_map, tool_catalog_query, next_best_tool, mission_route, and agent_context_prepare to choose a curated path before selecting lower-level tools; use project_onboard first when entering a new or changed project; use architecture_map, entrypoint_flow_discover, blast_radius_analyze, and context_pack_generate when native large-repo intelligence is useful; use durable_repo_index_refresh, durable_semantic_index_refresh, test_impact_analyze_v2, dependency_security_report, action_policy_review, lsp_session_start, lsp_session_request, lsp_feedback_replan, and optimization_adapter_run when deeper project intelligence is useful. Use project_contract_detect, dependency_inventory, project_command_map, lsp_probe, diagnostics_from_command, diagnostics_query, impact_analyze, test_plan_select, verification_run, secret_scan, operation_risk_review, semantic_index_build, and semantic_search for lower-level project ground truth. Use repo_index_build and repo_index_query before broad grep or file reads for codebase questions; use repo_index_explain, repo_index_path, repo_index_report, repo_graph_export, python_graph_metrics, and python_graph_communities when relationships matter. Use media_dependency_report, media_ingest_pdf, and media_ingest_image for repo-local PDFs/images. Use shell_hook_plan before shell hook edits and require explicit apply for shell_hook_install or shell_hook_uninstall. Use discovery_har_import, discovery_openapi_import, discovery_http_crawl, discovery_browser_capture, and discovery_tool_spec_generate before generating API tools; browser capture is complementary input, not the core runtime. Use printing_press_register, printing_press_verify, printing_press_run, printing_press_register_agent, tool_factory_generate, tool_factory_validate, and tool_factory_write for generated tools when their capabilities match the task. Use agent_workspace_create, agent_workspace_write, agent_workspace_read, and agent_workspace_merge when concurrent workers need shared state. Use agent_dispatch_execute only for agents with configured CLI or HTTP runtimes. Use model_profile_select, model_profile_record_outcome, conductor_plan, conductor_replay, orchestration_trace_record, orchestration_dataset_export, orchestration_policy_train, orchestration_policy_evaluate, orchestration_policy_compare_baselines, orchestration_policy_activate, and orchestration_policy_live_feedback when comparing local model profiles or replay-gating orchestration policy. Use reasoning_trace_record, reasoning_dataset_export, and reasoning_strategy_evaluate when plan, critique, revision, and verifier quality should feed research. Use behavior_mode_set and behavior_minimality_review when dense output or minimality review is useful.
